overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, navigating through dimly lit interior corridors, exiting a room past neon signage, and entering an elevator to select a floor. The environment features industrial metal doors, vibrant purple and cyan neon lights, and wood-paneled elevator interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: small room with vending machine and metal exit door

events.description: player opens the heavy metal exit door

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening a metal door to exit the small room

entered.detail: heavy industrial metal door with green light above the frame
illuminated vending machine with colorful display showing SHUANG
glowing posters on the concrete wall advertising events

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a small dimly lit room with concrete walls, facing a heavy metal exit door. To the right is a brightly lit vending machine, and to the left are glowing posters. The player approaches and opens the door to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor with Luna sign and elevator access

events.description: exits the small room into a corridor with prominent purple and cyan neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor past a glowing neon sign toward the elevator gate

entered.detail: large circular purple neon sign with cyan arrow pointing left
metal accordion security gate for the elevator entrance
second vending machine visible down the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a narrow corridor illuminated by vibrant neon lights. A large circular purple neon sign with a cyan arrow dominates the left wall. The player walks toward an elevator with a metal accordion gate at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled elevator interior with metal fixtures

events.description: enters the elevator through the open accordion gate
turns to face the elevator control panel on the right wall

agents.ego_description: entering the elevator cage and turning to approach the floor selection panel

entered.detail: dark wood paneling covering the elevator interior walls
digital control panel with glowing green text displaying floor options
circular fluorescent light fixture on the elevator ceiling
horizontal metal rail along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player steps inside the elevator, which features dark wood paneling and warm artificial lighting. The accordion gate is now visible to the left. The player turns toward a digital control panel on the right wall that displays glowing floor options.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior during floor selection and door closure

events.description: selects floor 05: APARTMENTS on the digital control panel
elevator metal doors begin to close

agents.ego_description: interacting with the elevator panel to select the apartments floor, then waiting as the doors close

entered.detail: metal sliding elevator doors that close to seal the cabin

segments.scene_description: The player interacts with the digital control panel, selecting the fifth floor for apartments. The panel highlights the selection in yellow, and the metal elevator doors slowly slide closed, sealing the cabin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim concrete room through a neon-lit corridor and into the enclosed cabin of an elevator. It begins in a small, dimly lit space flanked by glowing posters and a bright vending machine, moving forward to open a heavy metal exit door. As the camera emerges, the environment shifts into a narrow hallway dominated by a vibrant purple and cyan neon sign, leading the way toward a metal accordion gate. The scene then transitions into the interior of the elevator, where the industrial aesthetic gives way to dark wood paneling and warm artificial lighting. Finally, the camera turns toward a digital control panel to select the fifth floor, and the metal doors slowly slide closed to seal the cabin.
